title: VS Code local VSIX install: v9 follows the local-file route
instruction: Install an extension in VS Code from local VSIX file "/home/user/test.vsix".
why_selected: The no-skill and text-only runs visibly loop on the Extensions/View entry point, while v9 opens the VSIX install flow and selects the file.

no_skills.caption: No-skills: reaches the Extensions area but repeats clicks near the panel menu and never opens the Install from VSIX file picker.

clip_probe.video_stream: Stream #0:0[0x1](und): Video: h264 (High 4:4:4 Predictive) (avc1 / 0x31637661), yuv444p(progressive), 1920x1080, 98 kb/s, 30 fps, 30 tbr, 15360 tbn (default)

source_probe.video_stream: Stream #0:0[0x1](und): Video: h264 (High 4:4:4 Predictive) (avc1 / 0x31637661), yuv444p(progressive), 1920x1080, 96 kb/s, 30 fps, 30 tbr, 15360 tbn (default)

text_only.caption: Text-only: alternates between the Extensions icon and View menu, but never commits to the local VSIX installation path.

clip_probe.video_stream: Stream #0:0[0x1](und): Video: h264 (High 4:4:4 Predictive) (avc1 / 0x31637661), yuv444p(progressive), 1920x1080, 92 kb/s, 30 fps, 30 tbr, 15360 tbn (default)

source_probe.video_stream: Stream #0:0[0x1](und): Video: h264 (High 4:4:4 Predictive) (avc1 / 0x31637661), yuv444p(progressive), 1920x1080, 83 kb/s, 30 fps, 30 tbr, 15360 tbn (default)

multimodal_v9.caption: Multimodal v9: opens Extensions, uses the overflow menu's Install from VSIX option, selects /home/user/test.vsix, and stops after the install path is completed.
